title: SCS Platform Magazine
subtitle: AI Design in Enterprise
disclaimer: Planning research · Jun 2026 · Not investment advice · Ranges are estimates

competitors.signal: Fast feature shipping; familiar to creative teams
competitors.gap: Tool-centric — not orchestrated across ops lanes
Generation without brand system + approval gates

competitors.signal: Systems at scale; AI bolted on
competitors.gap: Slow iteration; no unified agent surface

temperatureHeadline: Crowded at the tool layer. Open at the orchestrated platform layer.

marketOpportunity.headline: AI-led design in enterprise creative ops

ranges.label: Low estimate
ranges.note: 8% AI share of creative spend context

marketOpportunity.wedge: Design is one lane — Samuel coordinates creative with voice, scheduling, and growth capture.

principles.title: Hierarchy before chrome
principles.body: Emphasize with space and weight — not boxes-in-boxes. One clear emphasis path per view.

principles.title: Package, not pixels
principles.body: Ship masters + derivatives with provenance. Never hand-redraw per channel.

principles.title: Scroll by design
principles.body: Panels overflow gracefully; discover scroll through layout, not visible bars.

principles.title: Honest limits on the page
principles.body: Publish targets and planning estimates — not fake SLAs. Trust is the product.

proTips.title: Vibe once, spec forever
proTips.body: Capture the feel in a board + manifest; every export regenerates from masters.

proTips.title: Gold is accent, not wallpaper
proTips.body: Indigo field + champagne highlight — reserve gold for payoff beats and CTAs.

proTips.title: Agent surface, not tool stack
proTips.body: One door in (Sam). Sub-agents stay backstage until the operator cares to ask.

proTips.title: Review before render
proTips.body: Thumbs and changelog on prompts beat regenerating the whole filmstrip.
